data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] If Jira deletion succeeds but the process crashes before the SYNC entry is updated, a subsequent full sync could re-create the Jira issue. Consider tombstoning the SYNC entry (marking it deleted=true) rather than removing it, so the outbound bridge knows not to re-sync this ticket on future runs. This is a scope clarification for implementation — the done definition should explicitly confirm which SYNC update approach was chosen.
